name: Rotel Spaghetti Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 can ROTEL Diced Tomatoes and Green Chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, over medium-low heat, cook onion and garlic in hot oil until the onion is tender, stirring occasionally.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients except wine; heat to a boil, stirring occasionally.
3. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Stir in wine (if using) and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Makes about 1 1/2 quarts sauce.
